narrative: An 8‑year veteran serving as Senior AI Engineer at Netflix, a product‑first firm, brings deep expertise in search‑centric machine learning. Strong JD‑relevant skill match drives the ranking, as the profile showcases LoRA, PEFT and Learning‑to‑Rank techniques alongside practical work with Weaviate and BM25—exactly the tools needed for a Search & Retrieval team. The experience level aligns perfectly with the 5‑9 year band, and the candidate’s product background adds credibility. However, being based in Vizag and lacking a clear notice period reduces immediate location fit for Pune/Noida.
